title: Site Configuration
description: Configure basic site information including name, logo and icon

form.title: Site name
form.titleDescription: The display name shown in the browser tab and site header
form.logoDescription: Site logo. Recommended size 200x60px. Click to select from resource library
form.iconDescription: Favicon. Recommended size 32x32 or 64x64px. Click to select from resource library

dialog.logoDescription: Upload or select an existing logo image
dialog.iconDescription: Upload or select an existing icon image
